instruction: Enter the supplier audit results into the ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Supplier Audit Report
Supplier Name: Eastern Precision Parts Co., Ltd.
Audit Date: 2025-03-10
Auditors: Wei Dong, Sun Lei
Audit Type: Annual Routine Audit
Quality System Score: 92
Delivery Capability Score: 88
Overall Score: 90
Conclusion: Passed, maintain A-level qualification
Next Audit: 2026-03-10' > /home/user/Desktop/supplier_audit.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Supplier'; ws['B1'] = 'Audit Date'; ws['C1'] = 'Auditor'; ws['D1'] = 'Overall Score'; ws['E1'] = 'Conclusion'; ws['F1'] = 'Next Audit'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/supplier_audit_log.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Enter the supplier audit results into the ledger

Fill the audit results from /home/user/Desktop/supplier_audit.txt into /home/user/Desktop/supplier_audit_log.xlsx row 2: A2='Eastern Precision Parts Co., Ltd.', B2='2025-03-10', C2='Wei Dong, Sun Lei', D2=90, E2='Passed, maintain A-level qualification', F2='2026-03-10', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/supplier_audit_log.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Eastern Precision Parts Co., Ltd.' in s else 'FAILED')"
